LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-07-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF FRANCES SMITH'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ORDER TO STRIKE COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR. THIS MOTION SEEKS TO SET ASIDE A NOVEMBER 20, 2020 ORDER BY THE PRESIDING JUDGE STRIKING PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR FAILURE TO PAY THE APPLICABLE FEE AFTER PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS WAS DENIED. THE INSTANT MOTION MUST BE HEARD BY THE PRESIDING JUDGE IN DEPT. 206. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

LAW AND MOTION DEPT. 302 - DEFENDANT PEI ASSET POOL V, LLC'S AMENDED NOTICE OF DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. ON 11/20/20, THE COURT (DEPT. 206) STRUCK THE COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF HAS A MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM THAT ORDER SET FOR HEARING ON 2/9/21. PLAINTIFF MUST OBTAIN RELIEF FROM DEPT. 206'S ORDER BEFORE THE MERITS OF THE DEMURRER CAN BE ADJUDICATED. MOVANT MAY RE-SET THE DEMURRER FOR HEARING AFTER PROPER MEET AND CONFER EFFORTS IF THE PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE IS GRANTED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: PROCEEDING NOT REPORTED.

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT PEI ASSET POOL V, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF CAL. GOVT CODE 12900 ET SEQ AND CC 51 ET. SEQ FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS, NOT CONCLUSIONS REGARDING THE APPLICABLE TIME OF VIOLATION AND THE FACTS GIVING RISE TO THE PERCEIVED DISABILITY CLAIM. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR IIED IS OVERRULED. OUTRAGEOUSNESS OF THE CONDUCT IS AN ISSUE OF FACT AND DEFENDANT FAILED TO CITE ANY CASES FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT UNDER THE FACTS OF THIS CASE A DETERMINATION CAN BE MADE AS A MATTER OF LAW. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-06-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Aron Hier; 585-779-9337; appearing via Zoom on behalf of defendant PEI Asset Pool V, LLC.
Justin Kizy; 585-779-9337; apppearing via Zoom on behalf of defendant PEI Asset Pool V, LLC.
WookSun Hong; Law Offices of WookSun Hong/Bay Area Legal Incubator; 510-368-8538; appearing via Zoom on behalf of plaintiff Frances Smith.

Plaintiff contests the tentative ruling an seeks clarification. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT PEI ASSET POOL V, LLC's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained to the causes of action for violation of Cal. Govt Code 12900 et seq and CC 51 et. seq for Plaintiff to allege facts, not conclusions regarding the applicable time of violation and the facts giving rise to the perceived disability claim. Demurrer to the cause of action for IIED is overruled. Outrageousness of the conduct is an issue of fact and Defendant failed to cite any cases for the proposition that under the facts of this case a determination can be made as a matter of law. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT PEI ASSET POOL V, LLC's Amended Notice Of Demurrer To Complaint is Off calendar. On 11/20/20, the Court (Dept. 206) struck the complaint. Plaintiff has a motion for relief from that order set for hearing on 2/9/21. Plaintiff must obtain relief from Dept. 206's order before the merits of the demurrer can be adjudicated. Movant may re-set the demurrer for hearing after proper meet and confer efforts if the plaintiff's motion to vacate is granted.

MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF FRANCES SMITH's Motion To Set Aside Order To Strike Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is off calendar. This motion seeks to set aside a November 20, 2020 order by the Presiding Judge striking Plaintiff's complaint for failure to pay the applicable fee after Plaintiff's application for waiver of court fees and costs was denied. The instant motion must be heard by the Presiding Judge in Dept. 206.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
